data.narrative:
Ethos Space is a seed-stage company in Space & Aerospace founded by Brogan BamBrogan, Jeff Overbeek, and Ross Centers. The sector comprises 5 public comparables (RKLB, PL, LUNR, ASTS, SATL) and 8 private peers including SpaceX, Sierra Space, Planet Labs, Impulse Space, and Apex Space.

Standard valuation methods face material constraints. Peer-median analysis is inapplicable: while 11 same-sector peers exist, zero meet narrow filters for same-stage, adjacent-stage, or similar-valuation-tier alignment—the minimum threshold for reliable triangulation is 3 datapoints. Public-comp anchoring cannot proceed because target revenue remains undisclosed, which is standard for stealth-stage private companies. The public Space & Aerospace sector median P/S of 25.8x across 6 tickers provides directional context only but cannot be applied without internal financials.

This analysis cannot produce a quantitative valuation range given data constraints. A credible estimate would require either: (1) revenue or similar financial disclosure from Ethos Space; (2) identification of at least three directly comparable seed-stage aerospace companies with disclosed valuations; or (3) founder disclosures on capital deployment or commercial milestones. Until one of these inputs becomes available, valuation rests primarily on qualitative assessment of founders, technology differentiation, and capital efficiency relative to the sector's historical burn profiles.
